title: Yazılım Mühendisliği (İngilizce) Bölümü - Akademik Danışmanlık Hizmetleri
content:
Türkçe

English

Each faculty member in the Software Engineering Department provides academic advising to undergraduate students, balanced with their administrative duties and teaching loads. The department's main approach is to ensure that students maintain continuity with the same advisor throughout their four-year undergraduate education. In line with this approach, care is taken to assign each class to a specific faculty member. In addition to class advising, faculty members are also assigned as advisors for minor, double major, and Erasmus students.

Beyond course selection and academic advising, Software Engineering Department faculty members offer support to students in their career planning, internship, and part-time work processes, regardless of whether they are their assigned advisor. This support continues even after graduation. Advising activities are conducted within the scope of the

Istanbul Esenyurt University Associate Degree and Undergraduate Education and Examination Regulations

, which came into effect as of the 2020-2021 academic year. This directive defines the framework of faculty members' responsibilities in student advising. To ensure the smooth execution of advising activities, concrete measures have been foreseen, such as faculty members contacting students before each course selection period and responding to student emails related to advising within

48 hours

.
